title: STM32 DC motor driver with flyback
prompt: I want my STM32F103 to switch a small 12 V DC motor with an N-channel MOSFET low-side switch. The gate comes from a GPIO, the motor sits between the 12 V supply and the drain, and I need a flyback diode across the motor so the inductive kick doesn't destroy the FET when it turns off. Firmware runs the motor. Treat the motor winding as a modest resistive load and assume the FET is on for the bench check.
